title: stellina stagnalis
intro: Stellina stagnalis, also known as marsh marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant is known for its bright yellow and green flowers, which grow in wetlands and along streams. Stellina stagnalis has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting skin healing, and supporting digestive health.
